message:
fix: add promoted wisp fallback routing and fix PromoteFromEphemeral

After promotion, wisp IDs still contain '-wisp-' which caused all CRUD
operations to route to the (now-empty) wisps table. This made promoted
wisps inaccessible.

- Add isActiveWisp() helper that checks if a wisp still exists in the
  wisps table before routing; falls through to issues table for promoted
  wisps
- Fix PromoteFromEphemeral: use direct SQL for label/dep/event/comment
  copying (bypasses IsEphemeralID routing that would redirect back to
  wisp tables)
- Fix promote.go: use PromoteFromEphemeral instead of UpdateIssue
  (actually moves data from dolt_ignored tables to permanent tables)
- Apply isActiveWisp fallback to: GetIssue, UpdateIssue, CloseIssue,
  DeleteIssue, ClaimIssue, AddLabel, RemoveLabel, GetLabels,
  AddComment, GetEvents, GetIssueComments, ImportIssueComment,
  AddDependency, RemoveDependency, GetDependencies, GetDependents,
  GetDependenciesWithMetadata, GetDependentsWithMetadata,
  GetDependencyRecords

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
